title: Cuneiform Tablet #0108: Middle Assyrian Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
